programme.title: Counting Cars
programme.desc: Danny lets painter Ryan take the lead on a 1959 Chevy Panel Truck project he hopes to flip, and later motivates his crew to clean up the shop with an inter-departmental build competition.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Traffic Signal Poles, Coffee Filters, and Chainsaw Mining Machines
programme.desc: See how traffic signal poles, coffee filters and chainsaw mining machines are made, and why they are so in demand.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Time-Delay Locks, Brownies, Pallet Dispensers, and Crystal Chandeliers
programme.desc: Find out how time-delay locks, brownies, pallet dispensers, and crystal chandeliers are made, and why they are so in demand.

programme.title: Drive TV - Launch Pad
programme.desc: Host Luke Huysmans joins GWM's engineering team at the iconic Lang Lang Proving Ground, putting next-generation hybrid and off-road technology to the test on real Australian roads and terrain.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: The Imaginarium Science Center has asked ATM to design a giant ship-shaped tank with a replica of the USCGC Mohwak inside. Creating the unique shape of this tank proves to be an ocean-sized headache.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Bead Wire, Mini Pepperoni, Irrigation Sprinklers, and Leather Gloves
programme.desc: Find out how bead wire, mini pepperoni, irrigation sprinklers, and leather gloves are made, and why they are so in demand.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Mouth-Blown Window Glass, Water Pumps, Sake, and Tweezers
programme.desc: Insight into the production processes for making mouth-blown window glass, water pumps, sake and tweezers.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike takes on a Porsche 924, the first car he ever turned around on the series. Will fixing oil leaks and worn interiors be enough to earn a profit?

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett make a tank for world-famous artist and DJ Redfoo of the band LMFAO. The guys attempt their very first one-of-a-kind DJ booth aquarium.

programme.title: Shorty's Dream Shop
programme.desc: Shorty finds a rare gem: a 1969 Impala with only 14,000 original miles. The team focuses on getting it running and adding an air-ride suspension. Pete also looks to upgrade his '58 Impala.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.sub-title: Oakland Poltergeist, King Tut's Alien Jewel and Cursed Castle
programme.desc: Don investigates a sinister haunting at a California mansion, an ancient Egyptian relic that some believe is from beyond the stars.

programme.title: Texas Metal
programme.desc: Bill is more than excited to put his spin on a favourite, a 1968 Pontiac GTO. Plus, one of the shop's biggest builds, a '52 tow truck, finishes strong.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike takes on a Porsche 924, the first car he ever turned around on the series. Will fixing oil leaks and worn interiors be enough to earn a profit?

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Bead Wire, Mini Pepperoni, Irrigation Sprinklers, and Leather Gloves
programme.desc: Find out how bead wire, mini pepperoni, irrigation sprinklers, and leather gloves are made, and why they are so in demand.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Mouth-Blown Window Glass, Water Pumps, Sake, and Tweezers
programme.desc: Insight into the production processes for making mouth-blown window glass, water pumps, sake and tweezers.

programme.title: Drive TV - Launch Pad
programme.desc: Luke returns to Lang Lang for deeper vehicle development, exploring how GWM engineers tune technology for harsh Aussie conditions and pushing advanced systems to their limits.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett make a tank for world-famous artist and DJ Redfoo of the band LMFAO. The guys attempt their very first one-of-a-kind DJ booth aquarium.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike takes on a Porsche 924, the first car he ever turned around on the series. Will fixing oil leaks and worn interiors be enough to earn a profit?

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: The Chevelle makes it through paint and into the assembly area, where it comes back to life. New upholstery gives the car the real upgrade it needs, and just like that, Dave is the hero of the family again.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Art Burke attempts to keep his rig above ground on a melting ice crossing; polar driver Alex Debogorski battles his way up a mud-covered mountain.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: The Bushmen bog their dump truck and struggle to locate the source of water flooding their mine. Burst hydraulic pipes shutdown the dig leaving Rod to polish three small pieces of opal for a first ever attempted sale online.

programme.title: Aussie Lobster Men
programme.desc: This program follows the real-life dramas of six lobster boat captains, as they risk it all in search of the world's most prized seafood delicacy: Tasmanian rock lobster.

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: The Chevelle makes it through paint and into the assembly area, where it comes back to life. New upholstery gives the car the real upgrade it needs, and just like that, Dave is the hero of the family again.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Art Burke attempts to keep his rig above ground on a melting ice crossing; polar driver Alex Debogorski battles his way up a mud-covered mountain.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: The Bushmen bog their dump truck and struggle to locate the source of water flooding their mine. Burst hydraulic pipes shutdown the dig leaving Rod to polish three small pieces of opal for a first ever attempted sale online.

programme.title: Aussie Lobster Men
programme.desc: This program follows the real-life dramas of six lobster boat captains, as they risk it all in search of the world's most prized seafood delicacy: Tasmanian rock lobster.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Bead Wire, Mini Pepperoni, Irrigation Sprinklers, and Leather Gloves
programme.desc: Find out how bead wire, mini pepperoni, irrigation sprinklers, and leather gloves are made, and why they are so in demand.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Mouth-Blown Window Glass, Water Pumps, Sake, and Tweezers
programme.desc: Insight into the production processes for making mouth-blown window glass, water pumps, sake and tweezers.

programme.title: Drive TV - Launch Pad
programme.desc: Luke returns to Lang Lang for deeper vehicle development, exploring how GWM engineers tune technology for harsh Aussie conditions and pushing advanced systems to their limits.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett make a tank for world-famous artist and DJ Redfoo of the band LMFAO. The guys attempt their very first one-of-a-kind DJ booth aquarium.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Statue Restoration, Tripods, Polish Sausages, and Welding Guns
programme.desc: Find out how tripods, polish sausages, and welding guns are made, and go inside the process of statue restoration.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Find out how decadent champagne, the everyday necessity of ATMs, and powerful marine turbochargers are made.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant dive into the European sports car market, taking on a 1969 Opel GT with fresh body damage, a backfiring engine, shoddy brakes, and malfunctioning headlights.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett take on one of the most popular hotels in the world The Bellagio Hotel and Casino! Five times a year the Bellagio performs a massive makeover to their conservatory, and this year they want to add two giant aquariums!

programme.title: Kindig Customs
programme.desc: The Chevelle makes it through paint and into the assembly area, where it comes back to life. New upholstery gives the car the real upgrade it needs, and just like that, Dave is the hero of the family again.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: The Bushmen bog their dump truck and struggle to locate the source of water flooding their mine. Burst hydraulic pipes eventually shutdown the dig leaving Rod to polish three small pieces of opal for a first ever attempted sale online.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers World Tour
programme.desc: Mike and Elvis offer their expertise to petrol head and YouTuber Freddy, aka Tavarish, on his ambitious McLaren P1 build.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant dive into the European sports car market, taking on a 1969 Opel GT with fresh body damage, a backfiring engine, shoddy brakes, and malfunctioning headlights.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Statue Restoration, Tripods, Polish Sausages, and Welding Guns
programme.desc: Find out how tripods, polish sausages, and welding guns are made, and go inside the process of statue restoration.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Find out how decadent champagne, the everyday necessity of ATMs, and powerful marine turbochargers are made.

programme.title: Drive TV - Launch Pad
programme.desc: The Subaru Forester Hybrid Sport takes on the Great Ocean Road - showcasing capability, comfort and hybrid efficiency across one of the world's most scenic drives.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the country in search of elusive gems and other magnificent objects.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett take on one of the most popular hotels in the world The Bellagio Hotel and Casino! Five times a year the Bellagio performs a massive makeover to their conservatory, and this year they want to add two giant aquariums!

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant dive into the European sports car market, taking on a 1969 Opel GT with fresh body damage, a backfiring engine, shoddy brakes, and malfunctioning headlights.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Researchers claim hidden messages can be found within the works of Leonardo da Vinci, and other art throughout history, that may reveal an extraterrestrial influence.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Mystery Sea Beast, The Earth Is Alive and Shapeshifting UFO
programme.desc: What is the mysterious sea beast seen from the shore of a small seaside town in the U.K.? And were a field of massive mysterious jars made by giants?

programme.title: Unidentified: Inside America's UFO Investigation
programme.desc: Lue Elizondo investigates a \.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: Chuck receives a map from an informant supposedly leading to a hidden cache of recovered materials from the Roswell incident. He and his team go on the treasure hunt of lifetime to locate what could be the mother lode of UFO discoveries.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.desc: Hot on the trail of a massive stolen fortune, Josh chases the treasure of the infamous Spanish pirate Amaro Pargo. An exhaustive hunt of Pargo's stomping grounds in the Canary Islands leads Josh beneath an active volcano.

programme.title: Unidentified: Inside America's UFO Investigation
programme.desc: Lue Elizondo investigates a \.

programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: Chuck receives a map from an informant supposedly leading to a hidden cache of recovered materials from the Roswell incident. He and his team go on the treasure hunt of lifetime to locate what could be the mother lode of UFO discoveries.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers
programme.desc: Mike and Ant dive into the European sports car market, taking on a 1969 Opel GT with fresh body damage, a backfiring engine, shoddy brakes, and malfunctioning headlights.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.sub-title: Statue Restoration, Tripods, Polish Sausages, and Welding Guns
programme.desc: Find out how tripods, polish sausages, and welding guns are made, and go inside the process of statue restoration.

programme.title: How It's Made
programme.desc: Find out how decadent champagne, the everyday necessity of ATMs, and powerful marine turbochargers are made.
